events.description: 50 failed login attempts detected from a single IP address, indicating a high probability of a brute-force or credential stuffing attack.
events.action: Temporarily block the source IP address, audit login attempts for the targeted accounts, and ensure multi-factor authentication is enforced.

events.description: An internal system (10.0.0.55) downloaded an unusually large volume of data (15.5 GB), suggesting potential insider threat or compromised host exfiltrating data.
events.action: Isolate the host at 10.0.0.55 from the network, identify the owner of the IP, and audit the source and classification of the downloaded data.

events.description: An internal host (172.16.0.200) performed a rapid scan of 1000 ports, indicating potential host compromise or lateral movement preparation within the network.
events.action: Isolate the host at 172.16.0.200, analyze running processes for unauthorized scanning tools, and review network security group rules.
